# Scribe Ther­a­peu­tics files for IPO in test of pub­lic ap­petite for ear­li­er-stage biotechs

### [Kyle LaHucik](https://endpoints.news/author/kyle-lahucik/ "See all stories by Kyle LaHucik")

#### Biotech Correspondent

Scribe Ther­a­peu­tics [filed](https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1853921/000119312526294804/d21355ds1.htm) for a Nas­daq IPO late Thurs­day.

The move marks a piv­otal mo­ment for the biotech and the gene …
